Name: search_news_default_aggregate
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."search_news_default"("search" := $1, "max_len" := $2) AS "_fn_search_news_default") SELECT json_build_object('aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('count', COUNT(*)) FROM "_root.base")) AS "search_news_default_aggregate"
